movie.synopsis: When 24-year-old Divya is found dead, what initially appears to be a suicide soon unravels into a gripping murder mystery. Officer Vikram, known for his sharp instincts, delves into a maze of hidden motives involving Divya’s husband, stepchild, and maid. As buried secrets come to light and tensions rise, Vikram must investigate a house full of suspects and uncover the truth before time runs out.
